name: Dr. Kwame Asante
quote: Meridian's certification track is the first one I've seen that tests judgment under ambiguity, not just recall. It changed how we screen senior candidates.

name: Yuki Tanaka
quote: The regional chapter network is the real value — I found my current co-founder at a Tokyo chapter meetup two years ago.

name: Elena Petrova
quote: We used the post-quantum migration playbook almost verbatim for our own rollout plan. Saved us at least two quarters of research.

name: Michael Obi
quote: The Learning Hub courses are the rare kind that a busy engineer actually finishes. Short, dense, and immediately applicable.
